core_payload.content:
# Reminder

## 1. Role
Reminder will become a stronger follow-through system for N1Hub, where reminders act as context-aware commitment threads rather than timed pings.

## 2. Future Reminder Contract
The reminder layer will know when to resurface work, when to escalate, when to stay quiet, and how to fit the user’s actual rhythm instead of blindly replaying deadlines. It will carry richer quiet-window sensitivity, better return paths, and clearer coordination with tracker, notification, and calendar layers.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Intentions will stay alive at the right moment without turning the system into ambient pressure. Reminder quality will become a core part of execution trust rather than an afterthought of scheduling.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Reminder supports To Dig Deep by protecting commitments without letting the second brain become adversarial.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Reminder defines the future stronger follow-through system for N1Hub: context-aware commitment threads, better escalation logic, clearer return paths, richer quiet-window handling, and tighter coordination with tracker, notification, and calendar surfaces.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
